introSection:
Monster Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Galaxy Park in Bolivia.

According to satellite imagery, this coaster is first confirmed to be at the park in September 2010. It left between September 2012 and January 2013, but was present again in July 2014. Its last known appearance was in August 2016.

In May 2012 a worker fell to his death while either assembling or dismantling this coaster.
fullText:
Monster Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Galaxy Park in Bolivia.

According to satellite imagery, this coaster is first confirmed to be at the park in September 2010. It left between September 2012 and January 2013, but was present again in July 2014. Its last known appearance was in August 2016.

In May 2012 a worker fell to his death while either assembling or dismantling this coaster.


 * Photograph of Monster Mouse
